ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lug_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "lug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LUG hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of event (e.g., presentation, workshop, meeting) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker presenting at the event */,
  "attendance_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees allowed */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, cancelled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lug_events_lug_id FOREIGN KEY ("lug_id") REFERENCES lugs ("lug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lug_events_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lugs" (
  "lug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LUG */,
  "lug_name" TEXT /* Name of the LUG */,
  "lug_description" TEXT /* Description of the LUG */,
  "lug_location" TEXT /* Location of the LUG */,
  "lug_website" TEXT /* Website of the LUG */,
  "lug_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the LUG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "speaker_email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "speaker_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "speaker_website" TEXT /* Website of the speaker */,
  "speaker_social_media" TEXT /* Social media profiles of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "attendee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "lug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LUG the attendee belongs to */,
  "attendee_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the attendee */,
  "attendee_address" TEXT /* Address of the attendee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "type_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event type (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., attended, absent, pending) */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time of check-in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES lug_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_events" (
  "speaker_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker event */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "speaker_notes" TEXT /* Speaker's notes for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES lug_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_events_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lug_admins" (
  "lug_admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LUG administrator */,
  "lug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LUG */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "admin_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lug_admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lug_admins_lug_id FOREIGN KEY ("lug_id") REFERENCES lugs ("lug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the event (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES lug_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_ratings_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_ratings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES lug_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., slides, video) */,
  "material_url" TEXT /* URL of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_materials_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES lug_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES lug_events ("event_id")
)
